call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. I'm good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on the information you provided, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: Actually, I was thinking of using it for a down payment on a car. 
Agent: Perfect! That works great. The loan terms are very flexible. We can do anywhere from 24 to 60 months. What kind of monthly payment are you comfortable with? 
Eleanor: I'd like to keep it under $200 a month, if possible. 
Agent: Let me see… Okay, with a 60-month term, your monthly payment would be around $198. Does that sound good? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that sounds pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150. And, of course, the monthly interest. But honestly, at 8.99%, it's very competitive. 
Eleanor: Okay. And there's no prepayment penalty? 
Agent: Absolutely not. You can pay it off early without any extra charges. 
Eleanor: Alright, sounds good. Let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! I just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Financial Freedom. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I'm already getting calls from you people. 
Agent: But sir, this card has great rewards… 
Robert: (Interrupting) No thank you! I don't need another credit card. And stop calling me! (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Secure Finance. Your friend, Michael, referred you for a Personal Loan. How are you today? 
Jessica: Hey David, I'm doing well, thanks. Yeah, Michael mentioned you guys. 
Agent: Excellent! So, we've pre-approved you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. Michael said you were looking to invest in your business? 
Jessica: Yeah, exactly. I need some capital for inventory. 
Agent: Perfect. This loan could be a great solution. We offer flexible repayment terms. What kind of monthly payment are you aiming for? 
Jessica: I was hoping to keep it around $300. 
Agent: Let me calculate that… Okay, with a 60-month term, that's achievable. Your monthly payment would be approximately $332. 
Jessica: Hmm, a little higher than I wanted. 
Agent: I understand. We could extend the term to 72 months, which would lower the monthly payment, but you'd pay a bit more in interest overall. 
Jessica: What's the total interest I'd pay with the 60-month option? 
Agent: Let me pull that up… Approximately $4,920. 
Jessica: Okay. And what about fees? 
Agent: There's a $200 origination fee. But we don't charge any prepayment penalties. 
Jessica: Alright. I need to think about it. It's a big decision. 
Agent: Absolutely. I can send you a detailed loan agreement outlining all the terms and conditions. Would you like that emailed to you? 
Jessica: Yes, please. That would be great.

Agent: Hello, David? This is Lisa from Premier Financial. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
David: Oh, yeah, I did. Just looking around. 
Agent: Great! We're offering a $5000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 16.99%. It has excellent rewards points and a low annual fee. 
David: 16.99% is a bit high, isn't it? I've seen lower rates elsewhere. 
Agent: Well, sir, our card offers a lot of benefits. The rewards program is very generous. You earn 2% cash back on all purchases. 
David: I appreciate that, but I'm really looking for a lower APR. I tend to carry a balance. 
Agent: I understand. Unfortunately, with your credit score, that's the best rate we can offer at this time. 
David: Hmm. Okay. I think I'll pass for now. Maybe I'll check back later. 
Agent: Okay, no problem. If you change your mind, feel free to contact us. Have a great day!

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Universal Lending. We're offering a special Personal Loan… 
Maria: (Interrupting) You called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, we are offering a $3000 Personal Loan at 24.99%… 
Maria: 24.99?! Are you serious? I can't afford that! I'm already struggling! 
Agent: But we can work with… 
Maria: (Interrupting) No! I want to be removed from your list! Do not call me again! (Click)
